expected.notes: Rule requires is_nra neq yes but candidate has is_nra=yes, so advisory_fatca_8938 must not fire despite being on stem_opt track.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'advisory_fatca_8938', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - answers.is_nra neq yes
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
